headline: Should Carnival’s (CCL) Bulleit Bourbon Tie-Up Reveal a Deeper Shift in Onboard Profit Strategy?
summary: Earlier this month, Starboard announced it is partnering with Carnival Cruise Line and Diageo to offer a limited-edition, US$59.99 Bulleit Bourbon, sold exclusively in retail stores on 14 Carnival ships this summer as part of America’s 250th anniversary celebrations. This collaboration highlights how Carnival is using exclusive, experiential products to deepen onboard engagement and potentially strengthen higher-margin onboard spending. We’ll now examine how this exclusive Bulleit Bourbon...

headline: Carnival (CCL) Stock After One Year Return Of 26.9% Is There More Upside
summary: Carnival stock has been on many watchlists lately, and if you are wondering whether the current price fairly reflects its potential, you are not alone. Over the last week the stock returned 0.2%, with a 16.2% gain over the past month, a decline of 2.4% year to date, and a 26.9% return over the last year, while the three and five year returns stand at 109.0% and 16.7% respectively. Recent headlines around Carnival have focused on its ongoing recovery story and how the business is positioned...

headline: Carnival (NYSE:CCL) Posts Q2 CY2026 Sales In Line With Estimates But Stock Drops
summary: Cruise ship company Carnival (NYSE:CCL) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q2 CY2026, with sales up 5.3% year on year to $6.66 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.41 per share was 22.2% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Stock Index Futures Plunge as Tech Selloff Rages On, U.S. PMI Data in Focus
